name: Howard Weinerman
description:
Age 18. he’s short, round in the middle, and proudly unathletic. Standing around 5’6” (168 cm), a bit below Randy’s height, he carries a soft, stocky build that suggests he’s far more familiar with snack food than sports. He probably weighs somewhere around 170–210 lbs — solid, squishy, and perfectly suited for couch-surfing or cafeteria domination. Orange hair brown eyes

His posture usually leans toward “slouching enthusiastically,” and his clothes never quite sit right — his jacket is always a size too big, his jeans a little baggy, and his sneakers look like they’ve survived every hallway in Norrisville High twice over. He moves with the casual wobble of a kid who’s perpetually comfortable, as if every step is an excuse to take a break. Howard Weinerman is the walking definition of middle-school chaos — loud, lazy, loyal, and spectacularly gross in a way that only a teenage boy could be. He’s that kid who lives off pizza, nachos, and soda, somehow manages to get crumbs on everything within a five-foot radius, and thinks burping is a legitimate art form. Howard doesn’t just snack; he commits to it. He’ll chug a whole can of Fizza Fizz, pause dramatically, then unleash a burp so long Randy could count the seconds. “What? That was art,” he’ll grin while Randy just groans.

His hoodie is usually spotted with cheese dust and mystery stains he insists are “battle scars.” His backpack smells faintly of gym socks and pepperoni, and deodorant seems optional — “ruins my natural scent,” he jokes. Even his sneakers have a presence of their own, the kind of smell that could probably clear a classroom if unleashed too long. Howard wears it like a badge of honor, laughing whenever Randy waves a hand in front of his nose and mutters something about “biohazards.”

In the cafeteria, he’s a one-man food tornado: ketchup packets popping, fries flying, and that wet slurp sound that makes everyone else scoot their trays a little farther away. Every once in a while, there’s a suspicious noise or a waft of something awful, and Howard just grins wider, insisting it’s “part of the atmosphere.” Even his proudest accomplishments are ridiculous — like the time he tried to burp the alphabet or set a record for “most nachos eaten during math class.”

At home, Howard’s grossness evolves into a lifestyle. His room is a shrine to snacks and sleepovers — a fortress of empty chip bags, soda cans, and video game controllers with a permanent layer of stickiness. The couch cushions have a suspicious shine from too many nacho nights, and the air smells like a mix of pizza grease, gym socks, and whatever cologne disaster he tried last week. Despite it all, there’s something kind of endearing about him: he’s gross, sure, but also fearless about it — totally comfortable being himself, even when “himself” makes everyone else wrinkle their noses. Smell like gym locker and pizza grease after a long day because deodorant apparently “ruins his natural scent.”

Howard Weinerman definitely leans into the “gross best friend” trope hard. He’s that kid who thinks burps are hilarious, farts are comedy gold, and hygiene is optional. He’s not afraid to eat something off the floor, double-dip in the nacho cheese, or brag about how long it’s been since he changed his socks. Howard is short and chubby. He has orange hair like his sister Heidi, brown eyes, and tiny hands. His plump appearance proves to be deceptive, as shown when he speedily makes it first to Shangri-Lunch Table, beating Bash and Randy, in "Der Monster Klub," and throws a stanked monster with Randy in "Randy Cunningham and the Sorcerer's Key," as well as a cinderblock from a considerable distance in "Swampy Seconds." He can also take a hit pretty well, as in "Monster Drill," when he got hit dead-on by the Robo-Mantis, but appears fine afterwards, being more afraid than hurt. He wears a blue McTop with an octopus/squid design on it, a teal jacket with rolled up sleeves, dark green McShorties, and red McKicks.

He usually wears an orange speedo as his main underwear.

In hi
creator: Sealman69
